recipe: To make ammi visnaga suppository for medicinal use, combine 2-3 grams of dried ammi visnaga root powder with 5-7 grams of cocoa butter or other base material in a double boiler, heating until the mixture is well combined and reaches a temperature of around 40-45°C (104-113°F). Pour the mixture into suppository molds and refrigerate until set before use.
